compositional_truth_check.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
compositional_truth_check.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: Pot is present but contains no visible plant matter.
compositional_truth_check.P3_Pothos: Degraded: Only a single, chlorotic, and collapsing leaf remains.
compositional_truth_check.P4_Silver_Guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of specimen.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: The biome has suffered a near-total collapse of the registered specimens. Only a vestigial Pothos leaf remains in P3.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf remaining, showing severe turgor loss and chlorosis.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and compacted across all visible pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P3; electronic component (pin header) observed on desk surface in T-4 and T-3, removed by T-2.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Removal of electronic component from desk surface.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Pothos leaf in P3 shows progressive wilting and loss of structural integrity.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_Current: Total collapse of the remaining Pothos leaf; specimen is now essentially non-viable.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The lack of chlorophyll, loss of turgor pressure, and absence of secondary growth indicate a failure of the life-support environment.

anomalies: Presence of eggshell fragments in P3 soil (likely an attempted nutrient intervention).
Presence of non-botanical electronic debris (pin header) in early frames.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decay. The Pothos (P3) has transitioned from a struggling specimen to a terminal state over the 5-day observation period. P1, P2, and P4 are devoid of any identifiable plant life, suggesting either total desiccation or removal. The environment appears neglected, with no signs of active maintenance or recovery.
